texts.content_text1: Let's warm up! Have a guess on the statements below:
texts.content_text100: HIV can be transmitted through hugging or sharing objects
texts.content_text300: HIV is not transmitted through everyday contact like hugging or sharing objects; it spreads through blood and unprotected sexual contact.
texts.content_text101: Hepatitis B can be prevented through vaccination.
texts.content_text301: Vaccination is one of the main and most effective ways to prevent Hepatitis B.
texts.content_text102: Tuberculosis spreads more easily in overcrowded environments.
texts.content_text302: Overcrowding and poor ventilation increase the risk of tuberculosis transmission.
texts.content_text103: Sexually transmitted infections are always easy to detect because they show clear symptoms.
texts.content_text303: Many STIs may not show symptoms, making regular testing important.
texts.content_text104: People with diabetes in detention do not need special dietary care.
texts.content_text304: Proper diet and medication management are essential to control blood sugar levels in people with diabetes.
